description: Pad labeller layers: automatic labels, fixed manual layers, and saved user-created layers.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH pad_wells AS (SELECT DISTINCT name FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1 WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :fleet_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :pad_name AND (CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) IN ('', '__ALL__') OR name = CAST(:well_name AS TEXT))), fixed_layers AS (SELECT 'system:model:platinum_substage_labels' AS id, 'Automatic Substage Labels' AS name, 'System generated · Read-only' AS description, 'platinum_substage_labels' AS rule_concept_id, :labeler_id AS labeler_id, CAST(:pad_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, 'system-model' AS owner_email, 'system-model' AS created_by_email, 'system-model' AS updated_by_email, 'model' AS source_type, false AS is_editable, false AS can_edit, -100 AS display_order, true AS is_visible_default, 'active' AS status UNION ALL SELECT 'manual:shared' AS id, 'Manual' AS name, 'Shared manual layer · Editable by everyone' AS description, 'manual_shared' AS rule_concept_id, :labeler_id AS labeler_id, CAST(:pad_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, 'shared' AS owner_email, 'system' AS created_by_email, 'system' AS updated_by_email, 'user' AS source_type, true AS is_editable, true AS can_edit, 0 AS display_order, true AS is_visible_default, 'active' AS status UNION ALL SELECT 'manual:user:' || md5(CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT)) AS id, 'Manual - ' || :current_user_email AS name, 'Personal manual layer · Editable only by you' AS description, 'manual_user_' || md5(CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT)) AS rule_concept_id, :labeler_id AS labeler_id, CAST(:pad_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, :current_user_email AS owner_email, :current_user_email AS created_by_email, :current_user_email AS updated_by_email, 'user' AS source_type, true AS is_editable, true AS can_edit, 10 AS display_order, true AS is_visible_default, 'active' AS status), custom_layers AS (SELECT l.layer_id AS id, COALESCE(NULLIF(l.layer_name, ''), NULLIF(l.name, ''), l.layer_id) AS name, 'User layer · ' || COALESCE(NULLIF(l.owner_email, ''), NULLIF(l.created_by_email, ''), 'unknown') AS description, l.rule_concept_id, l.labeler_id, l.name AS well_name, l.owner_email, l.created_by_email, l.updated_by_email, COALESCE(l.source_type, 'user') AS source_type, COALESCE(l.is_editable, true) AS is_editable, CASE WHEN COALESCE(l.is_editable, true) AND (l.owner_email = CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT) OR l.created_by_email = CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT)) THEN true ELSE false END AS can_edit, COALESCE(l.display_order, 100) AS display_order, COALESCE(l.is_visible_default, false) AS is_visible_default, COALESCE(l.status, 'active') AS status FROM datastore:substage_label_layers_v3 l JOIN pad_wells w ON w.name = l.name WHERE COALESCE(l.status, 'active') = 'active' AND l.labeler_id = :labeler_id), unioned AS (SELECT * FROM fixed_layers UNION ALL SELECT * FROM custom_layers) SELECT id, name, description, rule_concept_id, labeler_id, well_name, owner_email, created_by_email, updated_by_email, source_type, is_editable, can_edit, display_order, is_visible_default, status FROM unioned ORDER BY display_order ASC, name ASC) q
